app_release_notes: v0.14.2 hotfix — splash "Try the Free Demo" button now actually launches the guided tour. v0.14.0 had the wiring in place but disabled because the panel was disappearing during testing. Root cause: the Excel-running watchdog timer started in the panel constructor and fired before Excel finished cold-launching, closing the panel prematurely. The main Loadscope window also competed with the tour panel for screen space at the top. Fix: defer the watchdog until Excel is confirmed up, and hide the main window while the tour is active.
